title: Resolution Requesting the Local Chief Executive Honorable Antonio L. Kalaw Through the Municipal Health Office and the Public Information Office to Intensify the Information Drive for the Pre-registration on Covid-19 Vaccination. (AUTHORS: HON. MIKO C. PELEGRINA, HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, HON. MIKE DEXTER A. CONCIO, HON. MARK LESTER B. DIZON, HON. CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, HON. RODORA P. LOARES, HON. ARLENE P. DELOS SANTOS, HON. JOZYLYN N. MANANSALA, 05/03/2021)
